chapter_title.en: The Chapter of Condolences and Grief During Calamities, Visiting Graves, Lamentation and Mourning Gatherings

text: 504 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «اَلتَّعْزِيَةُ اَلْوَاجِبَةُ بَعْدَ اَلدَّفْنِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.504 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"The obligatory act of offering condolences is after the burial."
